name: Betti's London Broil
recipeIngredient: My seasoning: 1 part garlic powder, 1 part onion powder, 1/2 part ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook and stir onions and 1/4 teaspoon salt in the melted butter until onions are tender and golden brown.
3. Keep onions warm over low heat.
4. In a small bowl, mix salad oil, lemon juice, crushed garlic, 1/2 teaspoon salt (if using), and my seasoning blend (garlic powder, onion powder, ground black pepper) until well combined.
5. Brush the mixture onto the top side of the scored flank steak.
6. Set oven to broil or adjust to a temperature of about 550°F (or 275°C).
7. Place the meat on the broiler pan and broil for 2-3 inches from the heat source until browned, approximately 5 minutes.
8. Turn the meat over and brush with the oil mixture.
9. Continue broiling for an additional 5 minutes or until desired doneness (rare) is reached.
10. Using a sharp knife, slice the meat across the grain at a slanted angle into thin slices.
11. Serve the sliced meat with the warm onions on top. Optionally, add a can of mushrooms to the onion layer.
